Added PUT /api/priorities/{id} for updating priority_order, POST /api/priorities/reorder for batch atomic reorder. Frontend priorities page has up/down arrow buttons that swap priority_order between adjacent items. Disabled on first/last row. Tests added for new Pydantic models.

Implemented all 7 SPEC endpoints in new router_v1.py. Extended schemas/schedule.py with 14 new Pydantic models. Registered v1 router in main.py alongside legacy router for backward compatibility. All business rules enforced server-side: BR-SCH-01 (weekday validation), BR-SCH-03 (country assignment), BR-SCH-04 (lock skip), BR-SCH-05 (no hardcoded data), BR-SCH-06 (updated_by/at), BR-SCH-07 (audit trail).

Implemented all 7 SPEC endpoints in new router_v1.py. Extended schemas/schedule.py with 14 new Pydantic models. Registered v1 router in main.py alongside legacy router for backward compatibility. All business rules enforced server-side: BR-SCH-01 (weekday validation), BR-SCH-03 (country assignment), BR-SCH-04 (lock skip), BR-SCH-05 (no hardcoded data), BR-SCH-06 (updated_by/at), BR-SCH-07 (audit trail).

Implemented all 7 SPEC endpoints in new router_v1.py (340 lines). Extended schemas/schedule.py with 14 Pydantic models for request/response contracts. Registered v1 router in main.py alongside legacy. All BR-SCH rules enforced server-side.
